extraction.one_line_summary: ALMEIDA João attacked with 6km remaining on Monte Bondone, THOMAS Geraint bridged at 4.5km, both collaborated to put 25 seconds into ROGLIČ Primož who barely survived thanks to KUSS Sepp.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma's satellite breakaway tactic with HAGUE and CONRAD at 4:30 GC deficit failed to prevent maglia rosa loss.
UAE used FORMOLO then VINE as final lead-out before ALMEIDA's 6km attack, burning domestiques deeper than expected.
THOMAS bridged to ALMEIDA at 4.5km then cooperated rather than attacking, prioritizing time gaps over stage win.
ROGLIČ cracked to 30 seconds down mid-climb but KUSS's pacing allowed him to limit losses to 25 seconds by finish.

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: at 36 years old, bridged a 6km attack on final climb and showed stronger finishing legs than younger rivals
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: initiated winning move with 6km remaining, demonstrated rare combination of climbing power and tactical maturity to accept collaboration
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: negative: cracked to 30 seconds deficit mid-climb, entirely dependent on KUSS for damage limitation unlike previous form
rider_signals.DUNBAR Eddie: positive: survived breakaway on hardest stage since 2006 to move into fifth overall at 3:03, unexpected GC contender emergence
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: paced ROGLIČ back from 30-second deficit to 25-second loss, proving indispensable domestique value on extreme climbs
rider_signals.HEALY Ben: neutral: won maximum KOM points on first climb to take jersey, 20-point lead but focused on classification not GC
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: negative: cracked on final climb after being protected, exposing limits on 5500m+ climbing stages
